fileSpec.purpose: Environment configuration file containing environment variables for database connection and authentication secrets
requirements: File must contain DATABASE_URL for PostgreSQL connection
File must contain NEXTAUTH_SECRET for authentication
File must be excluded from version control

fileSpec.purpose: Prisma database schema defining User and Task models with their relationships and constraints
requirements: Schema must define User model with id, email, and password fields
Schema must define Task model with id, title, and userId foreign key
Schema must establish relation between Task and User models
Schema must use cuid() for primary keys

fileSpec.purpose: Pure business logic for authentication handling login, logout, and session management
requirements: Authentication must be secure and reliable
Must implement JWT token generation and validation
Must handle password hashing and verification

fileSpec.purpose: Pure business logic for user management including CRUD operations and validation
requirements: User data must be secure and reliable
Must implement user creation, retrieval, update, and deletion
Must validate user input and handle errors

fileSpec.purpose: Shared utility functions for string manipulation, date formatting, and common operations
requirements: Functions must be reusable and reliable
Must include helper functions for validation and transformation
Must be pure functions without side effects

fileSpec.purpose: Service for sending notifications via email or push notifications
requirements: Service must handle notification sending
Must support multiple notification channels
Must handle delivery failures gracefully

fileSpec.purpose: Integration with Stripe payment service for processing payments and managing subscriptions
requirements: Integration must handle payment processing
Must create and manage payment intents
Must handle webhook events from Stripe

fileSpec.purpose: Repository for todo list feature handling database CRUD operations for tasks
requirements: Repository must handle database CRUD operations
Must use Prisma client for database interactions
Must implement task creation, retrieval, update, and deletion

fileSpec.purpose: Use case for todo list feature implementing business logic for task management
requirements: Service must handle task CRUD operations
Must validate task data before processing
Must coordinate between repository and domain logic

fileSpec.purpose: UI component for todo list page handling task creation, editing, and deletion
requirements: Page must handle task creation, editing, and deletion
Must provide user interface for managing tasks
Must integrate with todo-service for data operations

fileSpec.purpose: Root layout for Next.js application providing global styling and navigation structure
requirements: Layout must be responsive and accessible
Must include global CSS styles
Must provide navigation context for the application

fileSpec.purpose: Root page for Next.js application handling user authentication and registration
requirements: Page must handle user authentication and registration
Must provide login and registration forms
Must integrate with auth domain for authentication logic

fileSpec.purpose: Build script for application handling compilation and bundling
requirements: Script must handle build process
Must compile TypeScript code
Must bundle assets for production

fileSpec.purpose: Unit test for todo service testing business logic and edge cases
requirements: Test must handle unit testing
Must test all service methods
Must mock repository dependencies
